commands.review_summary:
The branch captures successful internal-ui `message.send` source replies, carries them through the embedded attempt result, and adds focused subscription/payload regression coverage plus a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. this is source-reproducible: current main emits internal-ui source reply results and already has a final-payload mirror for `messagingToolSourceReplyPayloads`, but the subscription path does not populate that array before this PR. I did not run a live TUI session because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: The PR has a protected `maintainer` label and needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof; there is no narrow automated repair to queue from this review.

target.title: fix(agents): mirror internal ui message tool replies
target.body:
## Summary
- Capture successful `message.send` tool results that target the internal UI source reply sink.
- Feed those captured source-reply payloads into the existing message-tool-only final payload mirror so `openclaw tui` receives visible output even when trailing assistant text is suppressed.
- Keep dry-run and external-channel sends out of the mirror, and cover the regression with focused subscription/payload tests.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.handlers.tools.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-subscribe.subscribe-embedded-pi-session.suppresses-message-end-block-replies-message-tool.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/payloads.test.ts src/agents/pi-embedded-runner/run/message-tool-terminal.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- Testbox-through-Crabbox changed gate: provider=blacksmith-testbox, id=tbx_01ks96aeradhgnxgdxzd6qm4aj, Actions run=https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26319490160, command=`corepack pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: TUI/internal UI message-tool-only turns no longer go silent after a successful `message.send`; the same message-tool source reply payload is mirrored into the final chat payload path.
Real environment tested: Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox on Linux, plus focused WSL local tests in the OpenClaw worktree.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `corepack pnpm check:changed` on Testbox id `tbx_01ks96aeradhgnxgdxzd6qm4aj`; focused local commands listed above.
Evidence after fix: Testbox changed gate exited 0 and included core typecheck, core test typecheck, oxlint, import-cycle, runtime-sidecar, dependency, changelog, and guard checks. Focused local tests passed 98 subscription/tool tests and 46 payload/terminal tests.
Observed result after fix: Internal-ui `message.send` results with `deliveryStatus: sent` are captured and emitted as suppression-safe final payloads; dry-run and external sends remain excluded.
What was not tested: A live interactive Signal plus `openclaw tui` session with real channel credentials; the proof uses the production message-tool result shape and the existing terminal payload path without live Signal auth.

Fixes #85538.
